---
title: "Teaching"
---

# For Students
Are you one of my current students? If so, you can access Canvas or sign up for office hours through the links below.

[SMGT 326 - Sport Marketing](https://canvas.ithaca.edu/courses/37339)

[SMGT 385 - Sport Sales & Sponsorship](https://canvas.ithaca.edu/courses/38273)

[Office Hours](https://calendly.com/lwarwick-ithaca/30min)

# For Educators
Are you a fellow academic or educator looking for syllabi or examples of my teaching materials? Feel free to explore my showcase pages below or reach out to me directly.

[Sport Marketing](Sport_Marketing.qmd)

[Sport Sales & Sponsorship](Sport_Sales_Sponsorship.qmd)

[Sustainability in Sport](Sustainability_in_Sport.qmd)
